debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq α
inst✝ : SampleableType α
s : Skeleton
leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s
idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s
preexisting_cache : QueryCache (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail
    (((fun {α_1} x => (simulateQ randomOracle).toFun α_1 x) do
          let cache ← InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s leaf_data_tree
          let proof : List α := InductiveMerkleTree.generateProof α s cache idx
          let __discr ← InductiveMerkleTree.verifyProof α inst✝¹ s idx (leaf_data_tree.get idx) cache.getRootValue proof
          let x : Option Unit := __discr
          pure PUnit.unit).run
      preexisting_cache)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
revert preexisting_cache
  rw [randomOracle_neverFails_iff_runWithOracle_neverFails]
  intro f
  have runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree {s} (lt : LeafData α s) :
      runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree lt) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash lt fun x y => f () (x, y) := by
    induction lt with
    | leaf a => rfl
    | internal l r ihL ihR =>
      simp only [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ihL, ihR, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
  have runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot {s} (idx : BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex s) (lv : α) (p : List α) :
      runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot idx lv p) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash idx lv p fun x y => f () (x, y) := by
    induction p generalizing s idx with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons sib rest ih =>
      cases s with
      | leaf => cases idx; rfl
      | internal sl sr =>
        cases idx with
        | ofLeft iL => simp only [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ih iL, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
        | ofRight iR => simp only [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, ih iR, singleHash, runWithOracle_query]
  simp_rw [verifyProof, guard_eq, bind_pure_comp, id_map', runWithOracle_bind,
    runWithOracle_buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_getPutativeRoot]
  simp only [apply_ite, runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_failure, Option.bind_eq_bind,
    Option.bind_some, Option.isSome_some, Option.isSome_none, Bool.if_false_right, Bool.and_true,
    decide_eq_true_eq]
  exact functional_completeness α idx leaf_data_tree fun left right ↦ f () (left, right)
